overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rainy night forest with a torch, entering a wooden hut to explore, then continuing along a waterfront path toward an old stone bridge.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy forest path holding a lit torch to illuminate the way

entered.detail: Dense canopy of forest trees creating a natural corridor
Winding muddy trail through the forest
Low stone retaining wall along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through a dense forest during a heavy nighttime rainstorm. Tall trees line both sides of the trail while a stone wall runs along the right edge, and the torch illuminates the wet ground ahead.

events.description: character approaches and opens the wooden door to enter the hut

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden hut and opening the door to enter the shelter

entered.detail: Small rustic wooden shack with weathered planks and sloped roof
Simple wooden door with metal hinges

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a small clearing where a rustic wooden hut stands ahead. The character approaches the structure through the rain, reaches the wooden door, and enters the building to escape the weather.

agents.ego_description: walking around the interior of the hut examining the sparse furnishings and layout

entered.detail: Rough-hewn wooden plank walls of the interior
Simple wooden bed frame with straw mattress
Wooden table with various items and a candle
Wooden storage barrels stacked against the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the small wooden hut, the torchlight reveals a sparse interior with wooden plank walls, a simple bed, a central table with candles, and storage barrels. The character explores the room before heading back toward the door.

events.description: character exits the hut to the outdoor waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path toward the old stone bridge in the distance

entered.detail: Exterior view of the wooden shack from the outside
Ancient stone arch bridge spanning the river
Flowing river with visible current alongside the path
Simple wooden dock structure extending into the water

segments.scene_description: Exiting the hut, the scene opens to a waterfront path alongside a flowing river. The wooden shack remains visible on the right while an impressive old stone bridge spans the river ahead. The character continues walking along the shore toward the bridge as rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, rainy forest path into the shelter of a rustic hut before opening up to a riverside landscape. It begins by tracking a character along a narrow dirt trail lined with tall trees and a stone wall, with a torch cutting through the heavy nighttime rain. As the forest thins, the camera follows the character into a small clearing and through the door of a wooden hut, shifting from the storm to a dim interior filled with plank walls, a simple bed, and candlelit tables. The scene then transitions back outdoors as the character exits the building, where the view expands to reveal a flowing river running alongside the shack. Finally, the camera moves along the waterfront path, heading toward a massive old stone bridge under the persistent rainfall.
